name: Crypto Arbitrage Detection
description: Detect and analyze arbitrage opportunities across exchanges: CEX-CEX price gaps, triangular arbitrage within exchanges, DEX-CEX spreads, and statistical arbitrage on correlated pairs.
prompt: Detect and analyze arbitrage opportunities across exchanges: CEX-CEX price gaps, triangular arbitrage within exchanges, DEX-CEX spreads, and statistical arbitrage on correlated pairs. Uses existing CCXT multi-exchange connections.
